questions.content: Which of Mr. Jackson’s suggestions did Ms. Sohn implement?
questions.options: A. Allowing employees two fifteen-minute printing periods per day|B. Allotting a one—hour period at midday for emergency printing|C. Posting a sign—up sheet next to the printers|D. Discontinuing the use of color printers

questions.content: According to the memo, what is the problem with the color printers?
questions.options: A. They have not been ordered.|B. They regularly break down.|C. They fail to scan documents.|D. They are being overused.

questions.content: What is true about the new printers purchased by Reeder and Kelter, Inc.?
questions.options: A. They were delivered on November 24.|B. They include a three-year maintenance plan.|C. They will be serviced on January 18.|D. They came with free remote printing during the first month.

questions.content: What does Truzplan offer?
questions.options: A. Delivery of printed documents|B. Equipment insurance|C. Suggestions for accessories|D. Training in the use of equipment
